summary: Mado Regis is trying to grow a Camellia tree in a short amount of time with the help of Mado Kishi. However, things are not going smoothly and they have encountered various obstacles, including death worms that can swallow large monsters. Despite these setbacks, Regis remains determined to succeed and is prepared to restart their mission if necessary.
key_moments: Mado Regis' mission to grow a Camellia tree in a short amount of time
Encountering death worms that are strong enough to swallow most large monsters
Regis' determination to succeed and willingness to restart the mission if needed
